author: SantiMod
content:
THE COUNTDOWN IS ON for Tuesday, November 9!

 Four brand new spaceships: Pearce R8, Rainbow Om, Vzus ambwe & Pearce C9

 $ATLAS is becoming a payment option for all ships

 Expanded viewing options for in-game assets

 Read all about it now: 
https://medium.com/star-atlas/star-atlas-countdown-wave-4-spaceships-drop-atlas-payment-97b9e12c6ad1
